text.title: previous_response_id Worked Example
text.summary: Canonical multi-turn loop using previous_response_id with session-store + 404 fallback.

example.code:
import openai from typing import Optional
client = openai.OpenAI()
def turn(user_id: str, conv_id: str, prompt: str, store) -> dict: prev_id: Optional[str] = store.get((user_id, conv_id)) try: resp = client.responses.create( model="o3", input=prompt, previous_response_id=prev_id, # r1 ) except openai.NotFoundError: # r3 resp = client.responses.create(model="o3", input=prompt) store.set((user_id, conv_id), resp.id, ttl=24 * 3600) # r2, r4 log({"user_id": user_id, "conv_id": conv_id, "prev": prev_id, "new": resp.id}) # r5 return resp

example.note: Bad — drops id between turns; reasoning rederived every turn (r1 violation).
